ItacAcademyItem.Name: Abbdandonati (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Three branches of coral floating on the sea
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: The Abbandonati academy was based in Collegio di Montalto. In 1764 it published Rime degli Accademici Abbandonati, which is not in British Library collections.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
